caption: In a medical simulation room, several healthcare professionals are gathered around a simulation mannequin lying on a treatment table. One woman, wearing a blue scrub top and a mask, stands over the mannequin, while another woman in a black jacket, blue scrubs, and a mask stands at a wooden side table, organizing a blue tray. Two other women are present in the background: one wearing pink scrubs and a mask, and another partially visible on the right in a grey jacket. The room is equipped with various medical devices, including a red crash cart and a monitor. Across the sequence, the woman in the black jacket remains at the table while the woman in the blue scrubs maintains her position by the mannequin. On-screen text in the bottom corners of the frames reads "Day 2" and "Sim Week". The scene remains largely static, with minimal movement as the staff prepares for the simulation.
